tests.scenario: Sleep audio continues during idle device state
steps: Open the app and start a sleep audio session
Leave the device idle without interacting with the app
Observe playback while the session is in progress
tests.expected_result: The sleep audio continues playing until the content ends or the user manually stops it.

tests.scenario: Sleep audio does not stop unexpectedly before content ends
steps: Open the app and begin bedtime audio playback
Keep the app running in normal playback conditions
Monitor the session before the content reaches its end
tests.expected_result: The session does not stop unexpectedly before the content ends unless the user stops it.

tests.scenario: Browse short stress relief sessions
steps: Open the guided sessions section
Browse sessions intended for stress relief
Check the displayed durations of the available sessions
tests.expected_result: The system provides stress relief guided sessions with durations of ten minutes or less.

tests.scenario: Select a short guided session
steps: Open the app and navigate to guided stress relief content
Select one available short session
Review the displayed session length before starting
tests.expected_result: The selected stress relief session shows a duration of ten minutes or less.

tests.scenario: Free content label is shown before playback
steps: Open a content details page for a free item
Review the content access information
Check the status before starting playback
tests.expected_result: The system clearly indicates that the content is free before playback starts.

tests.scenario: Paid or trial content label is shown before playback
steps: Open a content details page for an item that is trial based or subscription only
Review the content access information
Check the status before starting playback
tests.expected_result: The system clearly indicates whether the content is included in a trial or requires a paid subscription before playback starts.

tests.scenario: Subscription confirmation screen shows pricing details
steps: Start the flow to activate a subscription
Proceed to the confirmation screen
Review the information presented before confirming
tests.expected_result: The confirmation screen shows the price, billing frequency, trial duration if applicable, and renewal terms before confirmation.

tests.scenario: Free trial confirmation screen shows trial and renewal terms
steps: Start the flow to activate a free trial
Proceed to the confirmation screen
Review the terms displayed before confirming
tests.expected_result: The confirmation screen shows the trial duration, billing frequency after the trial, and renewal conditions before the user confirms.

tests.scenario: Cancellation option is visible for active subscription
steps: Log in with an account that has an active subscription
Open the subscription management area
Review the available account actions
tests.expected_result: A visible option to cancel the subscription is present in subscription management.

tests.scenario: Cancellation option is visible for active trial
steps: Log in with an account that has an active free trial
Open the subscription management area
Review the available account actions
tests.expected_result: A visible option to cancel the free trial is present in subscription management.

tests.scenario: Downloaded audio can be opened offline
steps: Download an audio item while connected to the internet
Turn off internet access on the device
Open the downloaded content from the app
tests.expected_result: The downloaded audio remains accessible when the device has no internet connection.

tests.scenario: Downloaded audio plays offline
steps: Download an audio item while online
Disconnect the device from the internet
Open the downloaded item and press play
tests.expected_result: The downloaded audio plays successfully without requiring an internet connection.

tests.scenario: Offline playback does not show connection error
steps: Download an audio item for offline use
Turn off internet access
Start playback of the downloaded item
tests.expected_result: The downloaded content plays offline without displaying a connection error.

tests.scenario: Offline playback continues without skipping or restart
steps: Download an audio item for offline use
Disconnect the device from the internet
Play the downloaded item and monitor playback behavior
tests.expected_result: The session continues offline without skipping or restarting unexpectedly.

tests.scenario: Search returns relevant meditation content
steps: Open the app search feature
Search for meditation content
Review the returned search results
tests.expected_result: The system returns relevant meditation results.

tests.scenario: Category navigation returns relevant sleep or sound content
steps: Open the category navigation area
Browse the sleep or sound category
Review the content shown in that category
tests.expected_result: The system returns relevant sleep or sound content for the selected category.

tests.scenario: Library shows dedicated history sections
steps: Log in with an account that has completed and in progress content
Open the library or profile area
Review the available sections
tests.expected_result: The system provides dedicated sections for completed and in progress content.

tests.scenario: Library shows downloaded and favourited sections
steps: Log in with an account that has downloaded and favourited content
Open the library or profile area
Review the available sections
tests.expected_result: The system provides dedicated sections for downloaded and favourited content.

tests.scenario: Sleep content category includes sleep stories and soundscapes
steps: Open the app during a normal browsing session
Navigate to the sleep content area
Review the available types of sleep oriented content
tests.expected_result: The system provides access to sleep stories and soundscapes for bedtime use.

tests.scenario: Sleep content category includes relaxing music
steps: Open the app and browse sleep oriented audio content
Review the available content types
Check whether relaxing music is included
tests.expected_result: The system provides access to relaxing music as sleep oriented bedtime content.
